_about: Creative Library registry (repo/config, evidence-first), Property Pulse pilot. v0.2 evolves to the Creative Library v2 model (Governed Creative Design System): Style Guide -> (governs) -> Assets + Patterns (SIBLING libraries; patterns may reference assets) -> (compose) -> Template Families -> (instantiate as) -> Creative Instances -> Evidence. Asset references use asset_key (governed in c.client_brand_asset via resolve_brand_assets), never raw URLs. Schema: docs/creative-library/registry-schema-v2.md.
model: style_guide -> (governs) -> assets + patterns -> (compose) -> template_families -> (instantiate as) -> creative_instances -> evidence

posture.declarative_only: Declarative only — not consumed by production workers.
posture.pk_approval: PK approval authority unchanged; AI proposes, never approves
posture.vendoring_drift_note: The dashboard vendors a COPY of this file (lib/creative-library/registry.ts @ a prior source_commit); the dashboard does NOT read these v0.2 fields and must be re-vendored if/when a dashboard lane (A1.5) surfaces them.

style_guide.purpose: The Property Pulse brand constitution — the brand-level rules that GOVERN Property Pulse Assets, Patterns, and Template Families across static, carousel, and video formats.

governance.note: Governs the brand's creative objects; PK ratifies. AI may propose, never approves.

palette.scrim: dark scrim ~#0B1220 at ~62% opacity (evidence-derived from the proven caption/headline scrim)
palette.note: Brand primary/secondary colours are sourced at render time from c.client_brand_profile (brand_colour_primary/secondary) and are NOT documented here — marked to_be_confirmed. Only the scrim colour is evidence-derived. No brand colours invented.

typography.hierarchy: Headline dominant (heavy/large) > category badge / labels > subtitle (lighter/smaller) > footer (small).
typography.note: Montserrat is evidence-derived from the existing ICE render specs (worker templates). Exact weights/sizes per format are to_be_confirmed; no font names invented.

spacing.note: Side margins + safe-area bands per the proven templates; exact spacing scale to_be_confirmed. Declarative reference.

logo_rules.fallback: wordmark text if no logo asset
logo_rules.note: Logo referenced as a governed asset (asset_key pp_logo_primary); see asset_rules.

safe_area_rules.note: 9:16 reserves top/bottom brand bands (per video-worker layout, y140 / y1620); 16:9 uses a centred scrim/text panel. Keep logo + footer inside the platform safe area.

scrim_rules.applies_when: a background photo is present (governed backgrounds flagged needs_scrim)
scrim_rules.requirement: dark scrim over the photo so text-over-image meets contrast

voice_tone_rules.tone: Property market news — factual, concise, informative.
voice_tone_rules.note: Evidence-derived from the proven PP News content (market-update / price-news headlines); marketing personality beyond this is to_be_confirmed. Nothing invented.

accessibility_rules.minimum_contrast: white text over the dark scrim for legible contrast (exact ratio to_be_confirmed)
accessibility_rules.readable_text: minimum legible font sizes per the proven templates
accessibility_rules.text_over_image: no text over a busy photo without the scrim
accessibility_rules.safe_area_awareness: text / logo / footer kept inside platform safe areas

asset_rules.note: Assets are governed SEPARATELY (a sibling library) in c.client_brand_asset and referenced by asset_key — never raw URLs. The style guide may constrain HOW assets are used (placement, scrim) but does not own the files.
asset_rules.resolution: Asset resolution stays via resolve_brand_assets() — UNCHANGED; this style guide introduces NO new resolver behaviour.
asset_rules.backgrounds: governed PP backgrounds (bg_perth_cbd, bg_sydney_cbd, bg_brisbane_cbd, bg_pp_au_suburb_aerial_grid, bg_pp_home_keys_contract_table, bg_pp_perth_cbd_skyline_day_wide); must be governed before use; needs_scrim. PLATFORM NOTE (v0.5, day-hero promoted 2026-07-05): the resolver eligible pool is 6 for facebook/linkedin and 5 for instagram — bg_pp_perth_cbd_skyline_day_wide carries platform_scope={facebook,linkedin} so instagram excludes it

pattern_rules.note: Governs the Pattern Library v1 candidates — each conforms_to_style_guide=property-pulse-styleguide-v1.
pattern_rules.posture: patterns remain candidate; the style guide does NOT promote them to proven.

template_family_rules.note: Template Families MUST conform to this style guide. The style guide governs but does NOT render — variants carry the render proof.
template_family_rules.posture: style-guide conformance may be SUPPORTED by host renders; the style guide itself is not a render output.

evidence.notes: GOVERNANCE candidate — a style guide is NOT a render output, so no render_log_id is claimed. Supporting evidence (conformance, not proof): the proven PP News host renders (Gate C 7243e040, Gate D2 508b4365) + Pattern Library v1 + the governed static render e7d096b8. No PK ratification is formally recorded yet, so status stays candidate. No false proof.

patterns.purpose: Brand identity strip — logo, brand bars, and footer/website label that frame the creative.

layout_rules.logo_placement: Top-left, ~44px inset, ~90px contained; clears the platform top overlay (9:16 logo moved to y160).
layout_rules.brand_text_footer_treatment: Footer/website label, bottom-centred small caps; wordmark text fallback if no logo asset.
layout_rules.website_or_cta_text: The footer slot carries the WEBSITE (e.g. propertypulse.com.au). A distinct call-to-action is OUT OF SCOPE of this pattern (see pp_cta_strip — deferred, evidence insufficient).
layout_rules.spacing: ≥44px side insets; brand bars off the canvas edges in the 9:16 safe layout (bars at y140 / y1620).
layout_rules.safe_area: Logo + footer kept inside the platform safe area; 9:16 reserves top y140 / bottom y1620.
layout_rules.asset_dependencies: pp_logo_primary (logo_primary). Maps to Logo.source + Footer.text (documentation only, not a runtime binding).

accessibility_rules.note: Logo legible against the dark scrim/background; footer kept at a legible minimum size.

evidence.notes: SUPPORTING evidence only — the logo + footer strip appears in BOTH proven PP News host variants (Gate C 7243e040, Gate D2 508b4365). The pattern object itself is NOT independently render-proven.

patterns.purpose: Primary message — a required headline with an optional subtitle, set over the scrim.

layout_rules.required_headline: headline is the hard-gate field (a render must not proceed without it).
layout_rules.optional_subtitle: subtitle renders below the headline when present.
layout_rules.max_line_guidance: Headline ~2–3 lines; subtitle ~1–2 lines (declarative guidance, not a hard cap).
layout_rules.alignment: Centred (16:9); centred within the content band (9:16).
layout_rules.text_hierarchy: Headline is the dominant element (heavy weight, large); subtitle is lighter and smaller.
layout_rules.fallback_long_text: Long headlines wrap within the reserved text box; overflow handling is the render engine's responsibility within the band — declarative guidance only, no code binding.

accessibility_rules.note: White text over the dark scrim for contrast; minimum font sizes per the proven templates.

evidence.notes: SUPPORTING evidence only — headline + subtitle appear in BOTH proven PP News host variants (Gate C 7243e040, Gate D2 508b4365). The pattern object is NOT independently render-proven.

patterns.purpose: Numeric stat emphasis — a hero stat value with a label and optional context/movement.

layout_rules.required_stat_value: stat_value is the hero number (formatted for screen, e.g. $1.6M, +3.7%).
layout_rules.stat_label: Short label describing what the number is.
layout_rules.optional_context: One context line giving the stat meaning.
layout_rules.number_emphasis: Stat value is the largest, heaviest element (scale/bounce entrance in motion contexts).
layout_rules.comparison_movement: Optional +/- movement indicator (e.g. +3.7%) — declarative; not yet present in a proven host render.
layout_rules.maps_to: Forward-looking — corresponds to the existing video stat-reveal composition; NOT part of the proven PP News template family today.

accessibility_rules.note: Stat value high-contrast and dominant; label legible.

evidence.notes: FORWARD-LOOKING candidate — NOT present in any proven PP News render (the proven variants render a headline, not a stat reveal). No host-render support yet; used_by_template_families is empty and it is NOT in property-pulse-news.composed_of_patterns. Remains unproven until a host variant renders it.

patterns.purpose: Theme/category label (e.g. MARKET NEWS) with an optional location/date line.

layout_rules.category_field: category is the badge label (short, upper-case treatment).
layout_rules.approved_label_treatment: Small caps / badge style per the proven templates; concise wording.
layout_rules.placement: Above the headline block; location/date as a secondary line.
layout_rules.fallback_missing_category: If category is absent the badge is omitted (headline still renders) — declarative guidance; the field is otherwise expected.

accessibility_rules.note: Badge text legible against scrim; not the dominant element.

evidence.notes: SUPPORTING evidence only — category badge + location/date appear in BOTH proven PP News host variants (Gate C 7243e040, Gate D2 508b4365). NOT independently render-proven.

patterns.purpose: Full-bleed governed background photo with a dark scrim that guarantees text legibility.

layout_rules.background_asset_requirement: background MUST resolve to a governed asset (asset_key) via resolve_brand_assets — never a raw URL.
layout_rules.scrim_requirement: A dark scrim is applied over the photo (the governed PP backgrounds are flagged needs_scrim).
layout_rules.text_safety: Headline/category text sits over the scrim band, not bare photo.
layout_rules.contrast_rules: Scrim opacity chosen so white text meets contrast over varied photography.
layout_rules.fallback_background: If no governed background resolves, the host render fails loud (NO raw-URL fallback) — consistent with the proven governed render path.
layout_rules.governed_asset_dependency: References the 6 governed PP backgrounds (bg_perth_cbd, bg_sydney_cbd, bg_brisbane_cbd, bg_pp_au_suburb_aerial_grid, bg_pp_home_keys_contract_table, bg_pp_perth_cbd_skyline_day_wide — all exist in c.client_brand_asset; pool 3→5 per PK 2026-07-04, then 5→6 per the day-hero promotion PK 2026-07-05 v5.02). Per-platform: facebook/linkedin resolve all 6; instagram resolves 5 (bg_pp_perth_cbd_skyline_day_wide is platform_scope-fenced to {facebook,linkedin}). The resolver computes the eligible set live; this list is the governed superset.

accessibility_rules.note: Scrim ensures text-over-image contrast across bright/dark photos; needs_scrim enforced.

evidence.notes: SUPPORTING evidence only — background photo + scrim appear in BOTH proven PP News host variants (Gate C 7243e040, Gate D2 508b4365). NOT independently render-proven.

template_families.purpose: Property Pulse News — the governed COMPOSITION of the brand's news-card creative (branding strip + headline + category badge + background/scrim) across a static 16:9 variant and an animated 9:16 variant.

evidence.notes: DISTINCTION — Family = governed composition candidate; Variant = render-proven implementation target; Instance = produced render event (m.post_render_log). The family object is a COMPOSITION, NOT a single render: it holds NO independent render-based proof (proof_status=unproven, render_log_id=null). Proof lives at the VARIANT level (proven_variants): centred-scrim-16x9 (Gate C, 7243e040-2ef2-4d08-902b-94cee26af2d3) + centred-scrim-9x16-video (Gate D2, 508b4365-9dfc-4ec8-b491-2a3a1014d26b). Status is 'candidate' as a formalised v2 family object (the underlying templates are proven via the variants; the legacy implementations[] view is retained verbatim).

variants.purpose: RETIRED 2026-07 (artwork repurposed — see provider_status): was the proven Property Pulse News 16:9 image variant.
variants.provider_status_note: 2026-07-02/03 cleanup PASTE-REPURPOSED this provider ID: it now hosts generic_market_insight_card_1x1_v1 (1080x1080 1:1, TMR generic library; API-verified 2026-07-05, Provider Reconciliation v0). The 16:9 artwork no longer exists; rendering this ID yields the 1:1 market-insight design. Historical Gate C proofs below remain valid history.
variants.known_limitations: Static image only (no motion/audio); 16:9 master only (1:1 / 4:5 are future). Does NOT compose pp_stat_card_v1 (renders a headline, not a stat reveal).

evidence.notes: Gate C ICE-controlled template smoke (registers v3.81). Also has a governed manual render 'e7d096b8-6d6c-4af8-a245-dc35f83bd291' (Intake Lane 3B) with resolver_used=true / fallback_taken=false.

variants.purpose: RETIRED 2026-07 (provider template deleted — see provider_status): was the proven Property Pulse News video variant.
variants.provider_status_note: Deleted provider-side in the 2026-07-02/03 Creatomate cleanup (absence API-verified 2026-07-05, Provider Reconciliation v0). Gate D2 render evidence remains valid history. Future PP video work re-authors from scratch.
variants.known_limitations: The ice_format_key is 'video_short_stat', but the PROVEN render composes the NEWS patterns (headline/subtitle/category over background+scrim) — NOT a stat reveal. pp_stat_card_v1 is a forward-looking pattern NOT rendered by this variant (hence excluded from composed_of_patterns). No voice/captions in the proven smoke.

evidence.notes: Gate D2 ICE-controlled animated/video template smoke (registers v3.82).

variants.purpose: RETIRED 2026-07-04 (provider template deleted; superseded by Option D): was the LIVE B1 production 1:1 news variant. PP image_quote production is now TMR winner-driven (select_template; current winner generic_market_insight_card_1x1_v1).
variants.provider_status_note: Deleted provider-side in the 2026-07-02/03 cleanup -> 2026-07-04 production outage -> Option D (image-worker v3.22.0, commit 82f5c55): PP image_quote now renders the TMR selector winner at runtime; this variant is historical. B0/B1 proofs + production instances below remain the valid historical record (registry row c0b10001-...-0002 kept as production_proven history).
variants.known_limitations: HISTORICAL (pre-Option-D behaviour, accurate through 2026-07-04): 1:1 static image only. In the then-LIVE production path: headline is the only AI-authored REQUIRED field (hard-gated, max 90, fail-loud on blank/overflow); subtitle is DERIVED from the first non-empty draft_body paragraph (optional, max 90, truncated — never failed); category ('PROPERTY NEWS'), date (render date), footer ('propertypulse.com.au') are renderer-FIXED; location is empty in v0; background ROTATES deterministically per post_draft_id across [bg_perth_cbd, bg_sydney_cbd, bg_brisbane_cbd, bg_pp_au_suburb_aerial_grid, bg_pp_home_keys_contract_table] (B1-v3 v3.21.0 — pool 3→5, aligned to the governed resolver rank order, PK 2026-07-04); logo is fixed pp_logo_primary. Governed-only fail-loud — NO legacy fallback for PP. RUNTIME IDENTITY DRIFT: the worker emits render_spec.template.template_variant='centered-scrim-1x1' (American spelling) + implementation_id='news_static_centered_scrim_1x1_v1'; this registry uses 'centred-scrim-1x1' (British, sibling convention). Reconciled in capability_contracts[].maps_to_variant.

evidence.notes: B0 reusable 1:1 governed-template smoke (registers v3.98 / image-worker v3.13.0; _smoke/ only, resolver_used=true, fallback_taken=false, output 1080x1080 JPEG). LIVE PRODUCTION INSTANCES (image_quote news_card.v1, label=creative_library_b1_production, resolver_used=true): render_log fcbe5993-9791-45a6-98fc-a82c8ffd579f, 5b821214-63c4-4451-ad59-7090b00793d3, 53575bc8-f0e2-4c40-a99a-a7706da48513, 5f7cfc89-5895-44af-af80-56d76e9e856e; published to facebook (post_publish 1472a6fa-c338-46d3-abb3-be100696033b, 2026-06-29) + instagram (post_publish 88ee578a-f65b-49e7-a0df-67c57ba384cd, 2026-06-29). This is the variant the live PP image_quote path renders. (Prior render_log 52165857-ba7e-4a0f-82f0-92fd5f66537e was a stale/non-existent citation — corrected 2026-06-30; full proof set: docs/creative-library/format-variant-intake-pp-image-quote-pilot-v1.md.)

creative_instances._note: Creative Instances are NOT authored here — they are produced render events represented by m.post_render_log + render_spec.template + render_spec.qa. The registry declares families/variants; instances live in the evidence spine.

known_instances.notes: Intake Lane 3B governed render; resolver_used=true, fallback_taken=false.
B0 1:1 governed-template smoke (registers v3.98); _smoke/ only, resolver_used=true, fallback_taken=false.

LIVE governed image_quote production render (news_card.v1); post_draft 1d6c8bab-fd4b-4270-8da6-4561e06ef6df; label=creative_library_b1_production. The v4.08 ACI B1/B2 natural-evidence draft; published to facebook (post_publish 1472a6fa-c338-46d3-abb3-be100696033b, 2026-06-29T06:05:14Z).

LIVE governed image_quote production render (news_card.v1); post_draft 33b171fc-e68f-48aa-930f-2fe2ac9bfd94; label=creative_library_b1_production; published to instagram (post_publish 88ee578a-f65b-49e7-a0df-67c57ba384cd, 2026-06-29T00:00:26Z).
LIVE governed image_quote production render (news_card.v1); post_draft b4e811da-2bae-4b59-86cc-1b81a37f3131; label=creative_library_b1_production.
LIVE governed image_quote production render (news_card.v1); post_draft b4e44eef-b8bd-42fd-aba3-e64d6a15b64e; label=creative_library_b1_production.

capability_contracts.purpose: Canonical capability contract for the LIVE Property Pulse image_quote governed render path (B1-v3). Declares the variant identity, field classes + limits, governed assets, fallback, and the evidence later ACI slices stamp. Declarative source of truth; the runtime consumes a VENDORED projection (no live JSON import).

gate.note: Deterministic resolver inputs ONLY — no AI, no mix, no scoring. Any other client_id or format resolves to null (legacy path).

maps_to_variant.identity_drift_note: Registry variant key uses British 'centred-scrim-1x1' (sibling convention); the worker emits render_spec.template.template_variant='centered-scrim-1x1' (American) + implementation_id='news_static_centered_scrim_1x1_v1'. The vendored projection must reconcile this so later-slice evidence stamping matches the live render_spec.

ai_authored.note: B1_HEADLINE_MAX_CHARS=90 (PROVISIONAL/to_be_calibrated). Blank or overflow fails loud (image_status='failed') — no truncation, no AI rewrite in v0. Slice E adds one bounded repair.

derived.source: first non-empty paragraph of draft_body (renderer-derived; LOCKED v0)
derived.note: Empty/absent body -> '' (render proceeds). Over-length first paragraph is truncated (word-boundary + ellipsis), never failed. Authorship stays in image-worker for v0; the AI is only GUIDED (Slice D) to make the first paragraph subtitle-suitable.

background.note: FNV-1a 32-bit over post_draft_id mod 5 (B1-v3 v3.21.0 — contract v2: pool 3→5, aligned to the resolve_slot_assets eligible-pool rank order, PK decision 2026-07-04 'Option A-now-D-later'; alignment holds only while the governed pool is exactly these 5 in this order). bg_perth_cbd is index 0 (the v1 default).

validator_policy.slice_a: none (declarative identity + projection only — no validator, no AI change, no behaviour change)
validator_policy.slice_c: validate headline (<=90, present) + subtitle (<=90) + governed-asset reachability against THIS contract BEFORE render; record render_spec.contract_validation {pass|fail, failed_fields[]}; no repair yet
validator_policy.slice_e: exactly ONE bounded repair on failure, then fail loud; no loop; no attempt_number as control

capability_contracts.runtime_consumption: vendored projection only; NO live JSON import (runtime-import guard preserved). The vendored runtime-safe constant is derived from this entry and cites its source_commit.

evidence.proof_gate: B0 1:1 template smoke + live production render+publish (PP image_quote, facebook+instagram)
evidence.notes: PK-ratified ACTIVE 2026-06-30 (Format Variant Intake Slice 1B reconciliation). Proof is INHERITED from the mapped variant centred-scrim-1x1 (B0 1:1 smoke 50f09ca2) and is now PRODUCTION-PROVEN by real render + publish for PP image_quote on FACEBOOK + INSTAGRAM ONLY: production renders = production_instances above; publishes = facebook post_publish 1472a6fa-c338-46d3-abb3-be100696033b (draft 1d6c8bab, 2026-06-29T06:05:14Z) + instagram post_publish 88ee578a-f65b-49e7-a0df-67c57ba384cd (draft 33b171fc, 2026-06-29T00:00:26Z). Other platforms are NOT production_proven (no publish evidence). The contract adds NO new render proof of its own. The contract resolver (resolveCreativeContract) is wired in ai-worker for ADDITIVE draft_format.contract evidence stamping ONLY (Slice B1, register v4.06) — it does NOT drive format selection or render behaviour; the image-worker render path renders via the vendored b1_production constants. 'active' ratifies the contract DEFINITION + its inherited production proof, NOT a format-selection/render change; the vendored projection (creative_contract.ts) carries only contract-identity fields (no status/evidence) and is unchanged. Prior citation of render_log 52165857 was stale/non-existent — corrected to the real IDs above. Full structured proof set: docs/creative-library/format-variant-intake-pp-image-quote-pilot-v1.md. CONTRACT_VERSION v2 (2026-07-04): PK decision 'Approve Option A-now-D-later' (Lane 4, docs/briefs/lane4-rotation-alignment-packet.md) — governed_assets.background pool 3->5 aligned to the resolve_slot_assets eligible-pool rank order; the v1 ratification above covers the contract DEFINITION and inherited proof; the v2 revision changes ONLY the background pool binding (identity fields unchanged). 2026-07-05 NOTE: the mapped variant centred-scrim-1x1's provider template was deleted (see variant provider_status); production rendering is now Option-D winner-driven. Contract v3 (policy: tmr_spine) remains a separate gated carry — this note is truth-annotation only.

_implementations_note: v0.1 LEGACY view — superseded by template_families[] in v0.2; retained verbatim for back-compat / traceability. New work should read template_families[].
carries: A1.2 Pattern Library v1 — formalise the draft patterns (and Style Guide v1 in A1.3); they remain draft/unproven until then.
Style Guide + Patterns are declarative DRAFTs derived from the proven templates — NOT independently proven; no render_log_id is claimed for them.
Field -> Creatomate modification-key mapping is documented in pattern layout_rules as REFERENCE only; binding stays a future worker/render lane (no production consumption).
Registry vendoring drift: the dashboard's vendored copy predates v0.2 and does not read the new fields (re-vendor under A1.5).
No registry consumer wired (no worker/advisor/publish/dashboard reads this file) — intentional; declarative only.

v0.5 (2026-07-06, AP-3 declarative drift sweep): background pool 5→6 — added bg_pp_perth_cbd_skyline_day_wide (day-hero, PK-promoted 2026-07-05 v5.02) to the governed-superset declarations (style_guide backgrounds prose, pp_background_plus_scrim_v1.references_assets, governed_asset_dependency, centred-scrim-1x1.expected_assets). NEW platform note: fb/li resolve 6, instagram resolves 5 via bg_pp_perth_cbd_skyline_day_wide platform_scope={facebook,linkedin}. Historical pre-Option-D rotation prose (centred-scrim-1x1.known_limitations) LEFT as-is (accurate through 2026-07-04, predates day-hero — no historical rewrite). capability_contracts[].governed_assets.background ("mod 5") LEFT for AP-4 contract v3. Clears the AP-2 probe marker_declarative lag. Source: docs/briefs/ap3-declarative-dashboard-drift-sweep-v0-packet.md.

v0.4 (2026-07-05, Lane D dead-reference truth pass): all three PP news variants RETIRED as live truth (16:9 artwork repurposed to generic_market_insight_card_1x1_v1; 9:16 video + 1:1 provider templates deleted in the 2026-07-02/03 Creatomate cleanup — 1:1 deletion caused the 2026-07-04 outage, resolved by Option D winner-driven rendering). Evidence blocks kept verbatim as history. Also recorded: news_static_lower_third_1x1_v1 (provider 2fd50302-0e8c-45cb-bbfb-a89a6024f457) was authored in the B0 era but NEVER WIRED (no code/registry/provider trace) — no registry entry needed. Source: Provider Reconciliation v0 (docs/briefs/results/creatomate-provider-reconciliation-v0-result.md) + TMR-GOV-PROVIDER-1.

v0.3 (ACI Foundation v0 Slice A): added the LIVE 1:1 production variant centred-scrim-1x1 (it was missing — the registry previously declared only 16:9 + 9:16 while production renders the 1:1 fb9820f8 template) and the first capability_contract property_pulse.image_quote.news_card.v1. Docs/source-of-truth only — still NO runtime consumer.

ACI Slice A2 (next, gated): a VENDORED runtime-safe projection of property_pulse.image_quote.news_card.v1 + a deterministic resolver(client_id, recommended_format) in the worker layer, with Deno tests, UNWIRED (no behaviour change, no deploy). Runtime code -> external review.

Identity drift to reconcile in the vendored projection: registry 'centred-scrim-1x1' (British) vs worker render_spec template_variant 'centered-scrim-1x1' (American) + implementation_id 'news_static_centered_scrim_1x1_v1'.

Contract field limits (headline/subtitle max 90) are PROVISIONAL/to_be_calibrated (B1 cut-plan decision D) — the contract is the single source of truth; the worker's hardcoded B1_HEADLINE_MAX_CHARS is reconciled to it when the vendored projection is wired (Slice A2/B).
